S.FORM: Ellen Johnson Sirleaf I 1938 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Liberia anini i ci Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, patirengan a romi'ad i 2006 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 18 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: …ô…æ…æ…ôn *o~uƒßnso~un sir…æ…ôaf i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …ô…æ…æ…ôn *o~uƒßnso~un sir…æ…ôaf, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …æib~b~v…ôria anini i ¶i …ô…æ…æ…ôn *o~uƒßnso~un sir…æ…ôaf, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: Ellen Johnson Sirleaf I 1938 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Liberia anini i ci Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, patirengan a romi'ad i 2006 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 18 a romi'ad.
